untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'support level' (dynamic threshold), 'time spent below support' (temporal duration tracking), 'minimal closes below support' (count-based condition), and 'institutional accumulation' (volume/order flow inference). These require: (1) dynamic support level detection not available in indicator set, (2) temporal analysis beyond single-bar lookback, (3) multi-bar count conditions not supported by condition schema, (4) order flow/accumulation volume metrics not in allowed indicators. Approximation provided using pivot s1 as static support proxy, lower_wick as shadow proxy, but cannot capture institutional intent or time duration thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Used s1 (pivot support level 1) as proxy for identified support; lower_wick as proxy for lower shadow extension; close > s1 for close above support. However, the core signal mechanics—time duration below support, count of closes below support, and institutional accumulation detection—cannot be reliably translated with available indicators and single-condition logic. A proper implementation would require: custom support/resistance detection, bar-by-bar time tracking, and volume accumulation analysis (e.g., OBV, PVT, or institutional volume indicators not in the list).
